items.headline: Weekly mortgage rates, initial jobless claims, Kroger earnings: What to Watch
items.summary: Yahoo Finance's Josh Lipton takes a look at the top stories for investors to watch on Thursday, Jun. 18, including Accenture (ACN) and Kroger (KR) earnings, initial jobless claims, and weekly mortgage rates.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Accenture Faces a Cold Dose of Reality Ahead of Earnings. What Investors Should Know.
items.summary: Accenture is set to report before the opening bell Thursday. Concerns about AI disruption have taken center stage, but deeper problems lie elsewhere.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Berenberg downgrades Cognizant as AI risks cloud IT services outlook
items.summary: Investing.com -- Artificial intelligence-driven disruption is increasing pressure on the IT services industry, prompting Berenberg to turn more cautious on the sector as concerns grow over AI-led pricing deflation, uncertain value capture and a lack of near-term catalysts for a valuation recovery.
items.why_it_matters: News may increase risk, valuation pressure, or negative sentiment.
